title: Did fuyutsuki just rape Shinji NGE 2

[]: Did fuyutsuki just rape Shinji? (NGE 2)             Quote Post by DrthRvn » Tue Feb 13, 2018 3:35 am https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=r26VFYHj1dY The screen goes black and you just hear Shinji screaming

[]: Re: Did fuyutsuki just deadass rapes Shinji? (NGE 2)             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Tue Feb 13, 2018 5:42 am I mean... he seemingly showed Shinji sexually implicit photos of his Mother... that, coupled with Shinji screaming “help” doesn’t exactly help Fuyutsuki’s case. EDIT: The description of the video makes things clearer. Fuyutsuki still hasn’t gotten over his crush on Yui... and he thinks that Shinji looks a lot like her.

[]: Re: Did fuyutsuki just deadass rapes Shinji? (NGE 2)             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 13, 2018 6:44 am The last costume change was going to be into a bikini, that's all. That video was posted by a one-time forum regular. Probably discussed in one of these threads thread/6489/Shinjiko-WHY thread/9435/Shinjiko-WHY-Part-II

[]: Re: Did fuyutsuki just deadass rapes Shinji? (NGE 2)             Quote Post by Ray » Tue Feb 13, 2018 5:13 pm I'll never be able to take the discussion they had in 3.33 seriously ever again after this.
